Name: MENU_PARTS_MODEL_REND_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines parameters relating to the rendering of parts within menus.

Fields.Name: Initial Angle of the Model: X
Fields.Description: The initial angle (on the x-axis) of the model.

Fields.Name: Initial Angle of the Model: Y
Fields.Description: The initial angle (on the y-axis) of the model.
